subcodes.first_line: O faithful servant! This service is sovereignty, this servitude is freedom, and this bondage is kingship [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادم صادق این خادمی سروریست و این بندگی آزادگی و این غلامی پادشاهی هرچند
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @loving one's enemies; returning hatred with love, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @consolation and comfort
